data.name: FAQs
data.value: FAQs

data.name: MetaDescription
data.value: Frequently asked questions about VaultShop: products, shipping, payments, wholesale orders, and contact channels.

data.name: MetaKeywords
data.value: frequently asked questions, FAQs, shipping, payment methods, wholesale, VaultShop help

data.name: Question1
data.value: 1. What products do you offer?

data.name: Answer1
data.value: We design and make bags, backpacks, phone holders, and accessories inspired by anime, comics, and fantasy. Our catalog grows little by little, so there is always something new to discover.

data.name: Question2
data.value: 2. Do you make custom orders?

data.name: Answer2
data.value: At the moment, we do not take custom orders. Every VaultShop product is designed and made by us, and we invite you to explore the catalog to find a piece that fits your style.

data.name: Question3
data.value: 3. Do you ship orders?

data.name: Answer3Item1
data.value: Yes, we ship throughout Argentina through Correo Argentino, usually to the nearest branch.

data.name: Answer3Item2
data.value: If you are in Greater Mendoza, we coordinate direct home delivery.

data.name: Answer3Item3
data.value: For now, we do not ship outside Argentina, although we would love to offer it in the future.

data.name: Question4
data.value: 4. How long does delivery take?

data.name: Answer4Intro
data.value: After payment is confirmed, these are the estimated delivery times:

data.name: Answer4Item1
data.value: Greater Mendoza: between 36 and 96 hours.

data.name: Answer4Item2
data.value: Rest of Argentina: between 3 and 7 business days, depending on the location and postal service.

data.name: Question5
data.value: 5. How can I track my order?

data.name: Answer5Prefix
data.value: When your order is dispatched,

data.name: Answer5Suffix
data.value: we will send you a tracking number so you can check the package status through Correo Argentino.

data.name: Question6
data.value: 6. What payment methods do you accept?

data.name: Answer6Intro
data.value: We accept these payment methods:

data.name: Answer6Item1
data.value: Credit and debit cards, with up to 3 interest-free installments when available.

data.name: Answer6Item2
data.value: Bank transfer, with a 10% discount.

data.name: Question7
data.value: 7. Do you sell wholesale?

data.name: Answer7Prefix
data.value: Yes, we work with wholesale purchases.

data.name: Answer7Strong
data.value: Send us a message to request access.

data.name: Answer7Suffix
data.value: Once the request is approved, we enable the permissions needed to enter the wholesale area.

data.name: Question8
data.value: 8. Where can I ask for help?

data.name: Answer8Intro
data.value: You can contact us through:

data.name: Answer8Item2
data.value: Our social media profiles, available in the page footer.

data.name: Question9
data.value: 9. How are refunds returned?

data.name: Answer9
data.value: Refunds are returned to the same original payment account or card used for the purchase. Bank transfer refunds go back to the source account, and card payments are refunded to the same card.
